comment: Text is still visible and readable when resized to at least 200%.
Filter chips are accessible using a keyboard only.
The purpose of each filter chip can be determined from the text alone.
Focus is visible when navigating using a keyboard
Selecting a filter chip does not change the context of the content without notifying the user.
Where filter chips are used as part of the navigation this is consistent across the website.
All user interface elements, as well as their states (focus, hover, select, check, visited/unvisited, expand/collapse and outline) have a colour contrast of 3:1.
Text is visible/readable when the line spacing is at least 1.5 times the font size, letter spacing is at least 0.12 times the font size, and word spacing is at least 0.16 times the font size.
The size of the target for pointer inputs is at least 24 by 24 CSS pixels.
